inputs.pycode:
import subprocess
import os

# Install Ollama
r = subprocess.run('curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh',
                   shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=180)

# Start Ollama
env = os.environ.copy()
env['OLLAMA_HOST'] = '0.0.0.0:11434'
subprocess.Popen(['ollama', 'serve'], env=env, start_new_session=True)

import time
time.sleep(5)

# Verify
ps = subprocess.run('pgrep -a ollama', shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
result = 'INSTALLED' if 'ollama' in ps.stdout else 'INSTALL_FAILED: ' + r.stderr[:200]
